subject: History
chapter: Bricks, Beads and Bones: The Harappan Civilisation

remember: Students will be able to recall the geographical location of the Indus Valley Civilization
Students will be able to identify the major cities of the Harappan Civilization
Students will be able to list the important features of Harappan architecture
understand: Students will be able to explain the significance of the Great Bath in Mohenjo-Daro
Students will be able to describe the social structure of the Harappan Civilization
Students will be able to understand the importance of the script used in the Harappan Civilization
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of urbanization and its characteristics to the Harappan Civilization
Students will be able to analyze the role of trade and commerce in the Harappan Civilization
Students will be able to evaluate the significance of the Harappan Civilization in the context of Indian history
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the similarities and differences between the Harappan Civilization and other ancient civilizations
Students will be able to compare the economic systems of the Harappan Civilization and other ancient civilizations
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of the Harappan Civilization on the development of Indian society

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective: To study the geographical location of the Indus Valley Civilization and its major cities
As per NCERT objective: To analyze the social structure, economic systems, and cultural achievements of the Harappan Civilization
board_exam_objectives: To describe the geographical location and major cities of the Harappan Civilization
To explain the importance of the Great Bath and other architectural features of the Harappan Civilization
To evaluate the significance of the Harappan Civilization in the context of Indian history
